passed.name: Context Usage Breakdown
passed.summary: Cursor has introduced a new feature that allows users to see a detailed breakdown of their agent's context usage, enhancing user experience.

official_claims.summary: Cursor has introduced a new feature that allows users to see a detailed breakdown of their agent's context usage.

justifications.real_capability_change: The feature enhances user experience by providing detailed context usage, indicating a significant capability change.
justifications.selection_impact: The new feature is likely to improve user selection processes, impacting their workflow positively.
justifications.evidence_quality: The claims are verified with high confidence and supported by an official source.
justifications.ecosystem_echo: The feature aligns with current trends in user experience enhancements in AI tools.
justifications.durability: The feature is expected to have lasting benefits for users, contributing to its durability.
justifications.hype_penalty: No hype penalty is applied as the claims are substantiated.
